|[[Boss#Boss_slayer|Boss]]The odds of getting a specific [[Slayer task|task]] from the [[Boss#Boss_slayer|boss]] category is much smaller than getting a normal task, since there are two rolls for that task: one roll for the boss task, and one roll for the specific task within the boss category. |3-35The maximum amount assigned can be increased by completing tiers of the [[Combat Achievements]]: up to 40 with the [[Combat_Achievements/Easy|Easy]] tier, 45 with the [[Combat_Achievements/Medium|Medium]] tier, 50 with the [[Combat_Achievements/Hard|Hard]] tier, 55 with the [[Combat_Achievements/Elite|Elite]] tier, 60 with the [[Combat_Achievements/Master|Master]] tier, and finally 65 with the [[Combat_Achievements/Grandmaster|Grandmaster]] tier. | {{NA}}
